title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.456 - Court shall send order to department of revenue — record keeping required
text:
302.456.  Court shall send order to department of revenue — record keeping required. — The court shall send the order to the department of revenue in all cases where the driving privilege of a person is restricted pursuant to section 302.440.  The order shall contain the requirement for, and the period of, the use of a certified ignition interlock device under sections 302.440 to 302.462.  The records of the department of revenue shall contain a record reflecting mandatory use of the device.
(L. 1995 S.B. 102 § 4, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 577.606; Effective 1-01-17
